title: Using template within a workspace

posts.author: angwa1900 (Ang)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a project template that we encourage our team members to use when starting a new project.

However, sometimes we come across projects that need different group titles or different columns.

If we allow team members to create their own customized project boards, would that affect reporting, such as the “Workload” report?

Thx!
